title: cite-as
summary: Link relation type "cite-as": Indicates that the link target is preferred over the link context for the purpose of permanent citation. Defined in RFC8574.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT
